headline: Sequential Fall in AUM Balance Likely to Impact Invesco's Q1 Earnings
summary: IVZ's Q1 earnings are expected to have faced pressure from a slight AUM dip and weaker fees, even as revenues are likely to have risen y/y.

headline: STG Logistics announces deal with lenders, nears bankruptcy exit

headline: A Look At Invesco (IVZ) Valuation As It Moves Into Tokenized Asset Management
summary: Invesco (IVZ) is stepping further into digital asset management after investing in financial technology firm Superstate and agreeing to manage Superstate's tokenized Superstate Short Duration US Government Securities Fund (USTB) from the second quarter of 2026. See our latest analysis for Invesco. The Superstate partnership arrives at a time when momentum in Invesco’s shares has cooled over the year, despite a 9.96% 1 month share price return and a very large 1 year total shareholder return...
